metadata.name: salvo
metadata.description: Salvo — community-first Solana launchpad: batch-auction starts, holder fee share

instructions.name: buy
docs: Live-phase buy on the bonding curve. 1% fee, split 50/25/25 between
staked holders, the creator, and the protocol treasury.

instructions.name: claim_rewards
docs: Harvest accrued SOL rewards without changing the staked amount.

instructions.name: create_launch
docs: One click: creates the mint, mints full supply to the curve's vault,
burns the mint authority, and opens the salvo window.

instructions.name: migrate
docs: Takes the flat migration fee to the treasury and retires the curve.
TODO v2: seed the SalvoSwap pool with the remaining real_sol +
LP_RESERVE tokens in this same instruction (protocol-owned single-LP
AMM, same 50/25/25 fee split, so staker rewards outlive the curve).

instructions.name: salvo_commit
docs: Commit SOL during the salvo window. No tokens move yet — everyone in
the window clears at the same price when the batch settles. The
buyer's ATA is created here (buyer pays its rent) so distribution
after settle can never fail on a missing account.

accounts.name: buyer_ata
docs: Created now so post-settle distribution can never fail on a
missing token account.

instructions.name: salvo_distribute
docs: Permissionless delivery crank: after settle, ANYONE can push a
committer's pro-rata tokens straight to their wallet — the platform
bot cranks every commit so buyers never have to claim. Commit rent
is refunded to the buyer on close.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone may crank; the platform bot does in practice.

accounts.name: buyer_ata
docs: Normally created at commit time; recreated on the cranker's dime if
the buyer closed it in between.

instructions.name: salvo_settle
docs: Permissionless crank: after the window closes, the whole batch executes
as ONE buy on the curve. Everyone gets the same average price — there
is nothing for a sniper to win.

instructions.name: sell
docs: Live-phase sell back to the curve. Same fee and split as buys.

instructions.name: stake
docs: Stake tokens to earn the holder share of every trade fee, paid in SOL.
Each stake (including top-ups) restarts the anti-flash-stake cooldown.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: PhaseMismatch
errors.msg: Action not valid in the token's current phase

errors.name: SalvoEnded
errors.msg: The salvo window has already ended

errors.name: SalvoNotEnded
errors.msg: The salvo window has not ended yet

errors.name: WalletCapExceeded
errors.msg: Commit would exceed the per-wallet salvo cap

errors.name: GlobalCapExceeded
errors.msg: Commit would exceed the global salvo cap

errors.name: InsufficientCurveTokens
errors.msg: Not enough tokens left on the curve for this buy

errors.name: StakeLocked
errors.msg: Stake is still in its 5-minute cooldown

errors.name: StakeTooSmall
errors.msg: Resulting stake would be below the 1,000 token minimum

errors.name: StringTooLong
errors.msg: Name, symbol, or URI exceeds maximum length

fields.name: real_sol
docs: SOL actually held in the sol vault from curve buys (fees excluded).

fields.name: real_tokens
docs: Tokens still available for sale on the curve.

fields.name: salvo_total_sol
docs: Gross SOL committed during the window.

fields.name: salvo_tokens_pool
docs: Tokens cleared for the whole batch at settle; claims are pro-rata.

fields.name: pending_holder_rewards
docs: Holder fees that arrived while nobody was staked; folded in on next stake.

fields.name: lifetime_holder_fees
docs: Lifetime SOL routed to holders, for display.

fields.name: staked_at
docs: Refreshed on every stake/top-up; unstake requires the cooldown to
have passed since this timestamp.
